prompt: Simple line drawing illustration style, flat and light shapes, delicate and uniform ink-style lines, quiet and calm atmosphere. Monotone palette based on black, gray, and white, with a subtle accent by adding a hint of the eye color from the attached image to the eyes. Arrange characters in various poses and gestures randomly, like an illustration collection. No text. However, set the clothing colors to navy blue, red, and green, or various other colors. Add lines expressing their feelings to this image. Instead of speech bubbles, use a soft, handwritten font. Scatter many lines throughout. Think of the lines freely.
